decisions.rationale: The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id 'corridor_34th-st-busway'. The source '20100921_34th_cac_minutes' is already listed in that registry record's source_ids, and the alias 'corridor_34th-st-manhattan-20100921-cac' already appears in its record_aliases. The observation describes the same 34th Street corridor in Manhattan referenced as the '34th Street Transitway' — the same real-world entity as the 34th Street Busway. Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' (the observation already resolves to that id). No different target_record_id is appropriate.

evidence_refs.source_quote: distribution of project materials to businesses and residents along the corridor
